feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Field addition in 'Manage Documented Credit Decision' app with custom logic
entry.content:
Want to add some field with custom logic in app 'Manage Documented Credit Decision' .

Is there any way to add logic for the app in CFL? or is there any other way to extend the underlying RAP views ?

entry.title: How to add 'Additional filter option s4 standard event'
entry.content:
Hi,

I could extend the payload of event mesh for business partner as described below video.

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

but It failed to add the filter option in S4 hana on-premise. 

Position is not available in S4 Hana -on premise .

Can you please help on this?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: Replicate Business Partner from SAP S4hana to SAP CPQ extension fields mapping
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with the standard integration flow "Replicate Business Partner Relationships from SAP Master Data Integration", which is part of the SAP CPQ - Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Sales Order package.

Our customer requires the handling of a custom extension field (ZZExtensionField) that exists on both systems (SAP S/4HANA and SAP CPQ).
In the iFlow, this field needs to be mapped to the Customfields structure in SAP CPQ. However, since the standard iFlow does not include a mapping for this field, I need to implement it outside the standard functionality.

Here are some additional details regarding my challenge:

The post-processing step in the iFlow only receives the message payload, and the mapping uses Exchange Properties.
If I want to use these Exchange Properties in the post-processing step, I would need to replicate all standard iFlow requests (e.g., OAuth and Business Partner Get requests) within the post-processing.
Questions:

Is there a way to pass Exchange Properties directly to the post-processing step without replicating all the standard requests?
What is the best approach to enhance the iFlow to handle such a scenario without disrupting the standard design?
Are there any recommended practices or examples for efficiently extending the iFlow for custom field handling?
Any guidance, documentation references, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Chemical Vs. Material in EHS S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 
I have a question about EHS in SAP S/4HANA. In this area, we have to choose between Chemical and Material as the note below describes. 

Our client needs Risk Assessment for Chemicals, so we need The Chemical Solution. also, the client needs Waste Management, so we need The Material Solution. How can manage both of them?
links: 
Chemical 
Materials 

Regrads

entry.title: S/4 Hana On-Prem COPA Margin Analysis
entry.content:
In S/4 Hana On-Perm, to have both Costing-based and Margin Analysis to work in parallel, are there any prerequisites? For example should SD Copy Control for Delivery to Billing be activated in Margin Analysis? Without that would the PSG details still flow ?? Any additional settings are required to post deliveries and get COPA segments..

Thanks.

entry.title: Manage wokflow for purchase requisition app: add additional precondition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

when we are defining precondition able to set release approval for up to 7 precondition fields.

We need to few more precondition fields along with 7.

**Purchasing Organization**
**Purchasing Group**

**Item Category** 

 

like this we need to add few more precondition, how we are adding in GUI with reference to CEBAN structure.

Can you please let us know, how can we extend for addition precondition in Manage wokflow for purchase requisition app in FIORI?
 

 

Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Add an accounting document to an SD sales flow
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like some help, we need to make an accounting entry referring to a document billed by SD, but it will be a manual entry, I would like to know if there is the possibility of adding this entry to the SD flow, in VF...
Is there a more Standard way possible, and if it's just Z, how would I do it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PT BR

Ola!

Gostaria de uma ajuda, precisamos fazer um lançamento contábil referente a um documento faturado por SD, mas será um lançamente manual, gostaria de saber se existe a possibilidade de adicionar esse lançamento no fluxo de SD, na VF...
Existe algum modo mais Standard possível, e se for somente Z, como eu faria?

entry.title: Serial Number in Storage bin level without Handling Unit
entry.content:
Hello everyone,


We have some materials with serial numbers maintained at the MM level, 
Is there another way besides activating the handling unit, to trace the serial number down to the bin level?

Thanks,

entry.title: Is it possible to include configurations done in a Fiori app for aATP or records created in a TR?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

From past experiences I was never able to find out a way to move data records or configurations that are only done in Fiori apps from my DEV environment to TESTING and Production. However, I would like to know if any of you can confirm that indeed is not possible or if there is any possible way to do it.

I am thinking for example on the Manage Charactestic Combination app or even moving a high number of records created for product substitution. I was thinking that, if not possible, my only option would be to download these into excel and upload it by including in the desired apps this option.

Regards

entry.title: Table for Gate entry
entry.content: Hello SAP Experts, I need your guidance regarding tables in SAP that store gate entry details. I currently have a GRN report, but if a gate entry report is unavailable, I would like to develop a report for gate entries that have been passed but where GRN is not done. Additionally, please suggest if there are any alternative standard reports available for this purpose. Thank you!

entry.title: Syntax Error Include not found
entry.content:
Good morning
I have errors in some SAP transactions.
For example...

INCLUDE "IF_SALV_EVENTS_FUNCTIONS=====IU" does not exist.

Someone knows what may be happening

Thank you

entry.title: Restart specific step in flexible workflow for purchase requisitions
entry.content:
• Current Logic: In the current workflow, if an approver at Level 10 rejects a PR, the entire workflow restarts from the beginning.
  • New Requirement: Management requires the ability for an approver (e.g., Level 10) to reject the PR and have the workflow restart at a specific prior level (e.g., Level 5) rather than restarting the entire process from the beginning.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP RAP: Is it possible to add empty row to table on object page?
entry.content:
Hello,

Does anybody know if it's possible to add an empty row or row with default values on object page in SAP RAP?
I want to achieve something like this: I have root entity and this root entity has composition of roles. Now on the object page of the root entity want to add a role.
So I do not want to create one by one in another window. But want to do it only in table.
Add empty row -> fill it out -> save.

 

Is it possible somehow in sap rap? Or maybe I should add something in SAP Fiori elements?
I am attaching screenshot showing what it should look like.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: how to exclude some assets from the depreciation run
entry.content:
for some reason, depreciation shall not be posted to one or a few assets ans the user wants to exclude them in the depreciation run AFAB.

Locking them in AS05 does not prevent AFAB posting them.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migrating from ECC Org Structure (PPOMA/PPOME) to S/4HANA Teams & Responsibilities
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a 1:1 migration project where we want to move our organizational structure from an ECC system (maintained via PPOMA/PPOME) over to the new Teams and Responsibilities approach in SAP S/4HANA (Fiori-based Flexible Workflow).

Goal: We need to replicate the existing org data—positions, relationships, cost center ownership, and approval responsibilities—so that we can leverage the Manage Teams and Responsibilities app in S/4HANA for Flexible Workflows.
Scale: It’s a large organizational structure, so manually recreating it is impractical.

1. Has anyone successfully performed an automated migration from PPOMA/PPOME (e.g., HRP1000/HRP1001 tables) into the new Teams & Responsibilities or Business Partner model used by S/4HANA Flexible Workflow?

2. Are there any SAP standard tools such as SAP Data Services, Legacy Transfer Migration Cockpit (LTMC), or Migration Cockpit that directly support migrating Org Management (OM) objects to Teams & Responsibilities?

3. If no standard solution is available, would a custom ABAP extractor or program (reading from PPOMA/PPOME tables) and Fiori OData APIs be the recommended approach to bulk-load the data into S/4HANA?

4. Any best practices or gotchas for preserving existing approval rules (e.g., PFAC responsibilities, KMDIMS, budget limits) so that they seamlessly transition to Flexible Workflow?

We’re aiming for as “1-to-1” a solution as possible. We recognize that there might need to be some re-mapping in S/4HANA, but if you have any experiences or guidance on how to minimize manual process, I’d greatly appreciate it.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content:
Can someone pls help me with the analyzation of this.

Database and Applicationserver are on the same host. OS is SUSE Linux.

I added the files dev_disp and dev_w0 to this post. My Server worked last week without any issues.

entry.title: Adding Lean Service component in the maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I have configured lean services in the system, I can add it in a maintenance order for an operation. However, when I want to add it in the maintenance task list I cannot see the Item categories which were configured.

Can someone explain what could be the reason for this or am I missing something here?

Screenshots for reference:

1. Procurement mode is set to "Enhanced procurement mode" for my plant-order type combination.

2. PM/CS -> Maintenance and Service Processing -> Subcontracting for MRO process -> Define Item Categories

3. Configured Item categories not appearing in the "Services" Tab for Maintenance Tasklist:

4. But they are available in maintenance order operation

 

Is there something else I have to configure to get them in maintenance tasklist?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Creating a Contact Person from Supplier CR UI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question, can anyone tell me how the system understands which account group to consider when we create a Contact Person from a Supplier Master MDG CR UI? I believe we do not get to choose any Account Group of the Contact person to be created when we are inside the Supplier Master CR UI. I would like to know if there is any mapping of account groups (between main Supplier and Contact person) exists in regards to this mapping in SPRO.

My requirement is to create Contact persons with different Account Groups for different Suppliers(having different Account Groups).

Any reply would be much appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to tackle code adaptations for S/4HANA for IS-Health components?
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm well aware that my question is rather wide but this is due to the "simplification" item for IS-Health impacting various different object types. I became aware about this fun item way back in 2019 when I ran a first S/4HANA readiness check on our systems. Some of the items flagged in our Z-code are fairly easy to correct but for some others, I'm not quite sure what an alternative in S/4HANA could be.

My hope is, that some of you have already gone through this "exercise" and can suggest some fixes we could apply in our code. I'm especially interested in these issues:

No longer available message classes --> "copy" to Z-messages or using another SAP-provided message class saying the same thing (but hopefully in a very basic class)? We use at least these messages:

  • MESSAGE i179(n8). "There is no data for your selection
  • MESSAGE s064(nf) WITH sy-subrc 'LT01'. "Error & while calling transaction &
  • MESSAGE e115(n2) WITH wa_kna1-kunnr. "Customer & was changed
  • MESSAGE s259(n1me). "Material document & & posted

No longer available function modules --> are there other SAP-routines we could use or should we copy the code to Z-function group / modules or perhaps put the needed logic directly in the affect code if there not many hits and the code is short & straightforward?

  • ISH_BAPIRET2_DISPLAY
  • ISH_POPUP_TO_CONFIRM_SIMPLE
  • FORMAT_DATE_4_OUTPUT

No longer available Memory IDs --> I'm not really familiar with these, which doesn't help with deciding how best to correct the impacted code! Any suggestions of whether creating Z-Memory-IDs is an option or if something completely different has to be used in its stead?

  • FIL
  • ANZ

Any takers?

Thanks much and Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: we Created ZML81N tcode for Service entry sheet while doing SES getting error Enter Plant plz prov s
entry.content:
I am created Z tcode for SER (Service Entry sheet )  ZML81N while run this t code i am getting error Enter Plant while saving what should i do help me out. 

Enter Plant

Message No. M7018
